$schema_comment: Canonical source of truth for component support status. Markdown docs mirror this file.

components.name: Python SDK
components.description: Client SDK (protocol layers 0-2, client-side only — no gateway-side API)

components.name: Web reference client
components.test_command: cd client && npm ci && npm test

components.name: Desktop shell (Windows/macOS)
components.description: Thin Tauri shell around the shared browser client for Windows and macOS
components.test_command: cd desktop && npm ci && npm run build:app

components.name: OpenClaw gateway plugin
components.description: TypeScript OpenClaw gateway plugin (gateway-side relay adapter)
components.test_command: cd plugin && npm ci && npm test && npm run typecheck
